title: Cycle jour/nuit PS1 + DA cohérente toutes scènes (remplace S3-AMBIENT + S3-PIXEL)
description: Director q-20260413-003 + q-20260412-002 + q-20260412-004: Unified visual task replacing S3-AMBIENT-LIGHTING and S3-PIXEL-RENDER. Cycle jour/nuit en mode PS1 avec volumétrie. Temps réel machine/serveur pour saisons et cycle quotidien. DA cohérente entre TOUTES les scènes et animations. Effets visuels: pixel snap, affine textures, low-poly volumetric fog, dithering shadows, viewport scale. Exposer time_of_day + season dans run state + LLM context. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique. Director note: 'toute la DA doit être cohérente entre toutes les scènes, animations. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique sur l'ensemble des rendus graphiques.'

title: Typographie hybride: titre celtique + corps sans-serif
description: Director q-003: FONT_TITLE (celtique) + FONT_BODY (sans-serif) dans MerlinVisual.

title: Memoire narrative: RAG pour resume compresse story_log
description: Director q-001: RAG-based narrative memory. add_narrative_entry() per card, get_narrative_summary() for 3-5 items.

title: Configurer export web HTML5 automatise
description: Setup Godot HTML5 export. Verify SharedArrayBuffer headers. Output to web-export/.

title: Refonte Menu Principal
description: Meilleure introduction, shaders et graphismes PS1 avec bonne volumétrie et cycle jour/nuit, la scène doit être plus viable. Deep dive et itère jusqu'à acceptation du retour correct

title: Add amb_iles ambient sound for iles_celtes biome
description: S4-SFXMANAGER-AUDIT: 7/8 biome ambients registered. Missing: amb_iles for iles_celtes biome. SFXManager.play_biome_ambient('iles') silently fails. Fix: (1) Add gen_amb_iles() to SFXRecipesAmbient (ocean waves: low freq sine sweep + white noise, ~2s loop). (2) Add 'amb_iles' to names[] in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds(). LOW priority — iles_celtes is a late-game biome (maturity score 45+).

title: Refactor _reduce() megafunction: dispatch to sub-reducers
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-005: _reduce() at line 243 is 256 lines — 5x function limit. It's a giant match block handling ALL action types. Refactor: extract 4 sub-reducer helpers called from _reduce(): _reduce_run_actions(), _reduce_meta_actions(), _reduce_ui_actions(), _reduce_system_actions(). Each sub-reducer takes (state, action_type, payload) and returns bool (handled). _reduce() dispatches to correct sub-reducer based on action prefix. Maintains same external API. No logic changes — pure structural split.

title: Split _resolve_choice() in merlin_game_controller.gd (211 lines)
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-006: _resolve_choice() at line 499 is 211 lines. Mixed UI transitions + game state mutation + LLM trigger. Extract: (1) _resolve_choice_validate(choice_idx) -> bool — validates choice index bounds. (2) _resolve_choice_apply_effects(card, choice_idx) — calls store.dispatch() for game effects. (3) _resolve_choice_transition() — handles fade-out + scene transition. (4) _resolve_choice_trigger_llm() — schedules next card generation. Keep _resolve_choice() as orchestrator calling these 4 helpers in sequence. Each helper < 50 lines.

title: Split _wrap_text_as_card() in merlin_llm_adapter.gd (222 lines)
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-007: _wrap_text_as_card() at line 435 is 222 lines — parses raw LLM text, validates structure, and wraps into card dict all in one function. Extract: (1) _parse_raw_llm_text(text) -> Dictionary — parses options/title/effects from raw text. (2) _validate_card_structure(card) -> bool — checks required fields, effect caps, option count. (3) _wrap_text_as_card() becomes orchestrator calling parse → validate → assemble. Each helper < 60 lines.

title: Extract _poll_bg_tasks() + _poll_swarm_health() from _process() in merlin_ai.gd
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-008: _process() at line 2045 is 68 lines — exceeds 50-line limit. Logic: (1) swarm scheduler timeout check, (2) legacy timeout check, (3) poll active bg tasks, (4) dispatch queue. Extract: _poll_swarm_health() (lines ~2053-2076), _poll_legacy_timeouts() (lines ~2077-2086), _poll_active_tasks() -> Array[int] (lines ~2090-2107), process_completed_tasks(indices) (lines ~2109-2124). _process() becomes 20 lines calling these helpers. set_process(false) guard preserved.

title: Reduce 5+ level nesting in llm_adapter_text_sanitizer.gd
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-009: 22 instances of 5+ tab nesting in blacklist filtering and label extraction loops (lines 127-189). Use early-return guards and const extraction to flatten. Pattern: for word in list: if word in blacklist: (5 tabs deep) → replace with: if _is_blacklisted(word): continue. Extract _is_blacklisted() helper + NON_VERB_BLACKLIST const at class level.

title: Audit + fix parchment_display add_child orphan risk in merlin_game_controller.gd
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-010: _resolve_choice() calls add_child(_parchment) at line 317 but parchment node has no explicit queue_free or signal disconnect on scene exit. Risk: if _resolve_choice() is called while a previous parchment is still transitioning, duplicate nodes accumulate. Fix: (1) Check is_instance_valid(_parchment) + _parchment.is_inside_tree() before add_child. (2) Store reference and call queue_free on previous if still alive. (3) Or use CONNECT_ONE_SHOT pattern for animation_finished signal to auto-cleanup.

title: Clamp fins_vues + total_runs to maxi(0) in load_profile()
description: SPECIALIST-9: load_profile() clamps meta['anam'] to maxi(0) at line 147 but does NOT clamp fins_vues or total_runs. A tampered save with fins_vues=-999 would pass _validate() (is numeric) but give incorrect arc condition results (fins_vues >= 5 check would never fire). Fix: after line 151 (faction_rep clamp), add: meta['fins_vues'] = maxi(int(meta.get('fins_vues', 0)), 0) and meta['total_runs'] = maxi(int(meta.get('total_runs', 0)), 0). Consistent with existing anam clamp pattern.

title: Validate echo_memory sub-keys in _validate()
description: SPECIALIST-9 CHK-8: echo_memory presence now validated (is Dictionary). Sub-keys not validated: deaths_by_biome (should be Dict), dominant_factions_seen (should be Array), choices_log (should be Array). A corrupted echo_memory sub-key would cause silent type errors in analytics code. Fix: add _validate_echo_memory(echo: Dictionary) -> bool helper that checks the 3 sub-keys exist and have correct types. Call from _validate() after existing echo_memory dict check. Helper stays < 15 lines.

title: Validate biome_runs has all 8 biome keys in _validate()
description: SPECIALIST-9: _validate() checks biome_runs exists (is in required_keys) but not its sub-keys. If a save has biome_runs={} (empty dict), arc condition 'runs_in_biome' would silently return 0 for all biomes. Fix: after the existing faction_rep loop in _validate(), add a biome_runs loop: for biome in ['foret_broceliande','landes_bruyere','cotes_sauvages','villages_celtes','cercles_pierres','marais_korrigans','collines_dolmens','iles_mystiques']: if not biome_runs.has(biome): push_warning + return false. Or use MerlinConstants.BIOMES array if it exists.

title: Split _generate_procedural() 116 lines in merlin_skeleton_generator.gd
description: merlin_skeleton_generator.gd:162 — _generate_procedural() is 116 lines (2.3x limit). Extract: _build_main_path(), _build_detour_nodes(), _assign_card_types(). Each sub-function max 40 lines. Keep _generate_procedural as dispatcher ~20 lines.

title: Split activate_ogham() 94 lines in merlin_effect_engine.gd
description: merlin_effect_engine.gd:655 — activate_ogham() is 94 lines (nearly 2x limit). Extract: _validate_ogham_activation(), _apply_ogham_passive(), _apply_ogham_active(). Keep activate_ogham as dispatcher.

title: Split build_user_prompt() 92 lines in llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd
description: llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd:45 — build_user_prompt() is 92 lines. Extract: _build_params_section(), _build_player_context_section(), _build_arc_section(). Note: _build_arc_section() will be refactored by S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL — do AFTER that task.

title: Split check_run_end() 75 lines in store_run.gd
description: store_run.gd:202 — check_run_end() is 75 lines. Extract: _check_death_condition(), _check_escape_condition(), _handle_run_termination(). Keep check_run_end() as < 25 line dispatcher.

title: Implement IN_GAME_PERIODS faction bonus in card resolution
description: merlin_constants.gd:546-549 defines IN_GAME_PERIODS (aube/jour/crepuscule/nuit) each with faction bonuses. No code applies these at card resolution. Check current card index vs period card ranges, apply rep multiplier in _apply_faction_reputation.

title: Test faction ending unlock (>=80) triggers correct narrative route
description: Verify MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings() is called at run end when faction_rep>=80. Check game_flow_controller.gd run end sequence.

title: Test faction content unlock (>=50) gates special cards correctly
description: Verify cards with faction_required>=50 only appear when player faction_rep>=50. Check card filtering in merlin_card_system.gd.

title: Implement difficulty scaling per narrative context (bible s.6.3)
description: game_controller_minigame.gd:47 hardcodes base_diff=5 for all cards. Bible s.6.3: difficulty depends on card type (event=+1, Merlin Direct=no minigame). Add difficulty scaling: base by biome MOS score, +1 per card tier, +1 for event cards, +3 for critical (already done). Read card.difficulty or compute from biome maturity score.

title: Deduplicate minigame success SFX: base class vs controller both play minigame_success
description: minigame_base.gd:87 calls SFXManager.play(minigame_success) on success. game_controller_minigame.gd:100 also calls SFXManager.play(minigame_success). Result: success SFX plays twice. Fix: remove the SFX from minigame_base._complete() (base should not know about global SFX) and keep only in game_controller_minigame.gd which has full outcome context.

title: Add spawning for deadwood, groundcover, mushroom assets
description: Assets/bk_assets/deadwood/, /groundcover/, /mushrooms/ each have 6 foret_broceliande GLBs but forest_asset_spawner.gd has no code to load or spawn them. Add DEADWOOD_MODELS, GROUNDCOVER_MODELS, MUSHROOM_MODELS arrays to broceliande_forest_3d.gd and spawning calls in ForestZoneBuilder to enrich forest floor.

title: Fix BiomeWalkConfigs TILE_BASE: archive/ → Assets/Tiles/
description: biome_walk_configs.gd:8 TILE_BASE='res://archive/3d_models/Tiles_Low_Poly/' but terrain tiles are at res://Assets/Tiles/. Verify forest_terrain_builder.gd uses correct path. Also fix non-existent tile refs for villages_celtes (Tile_38_Path_Grass, Tile_34_Trans_Grass_Dirt) and cercles_pierres (Tile_39_Grass_Rocky) — replace with closest existing tiles (Tile_01 to Tile_31).

title: Add prop assets to BROC_ASSETS (prop_bk_foret_broceliande_0000-0005)
description: Assets/bk_assets/props/foret_broceliande/ has 6 prop GLBs (prop_bk_foret_broceliande_0000-0005.glb) never referenced in BROC_ASSETS. Add 3-4 as named entries (e.g. 'cauldron', 'campfire', 'cart', 'fence') to diversify zone 2 and zone 4 spawning.

title: Test: verify all BROC_ASSETS paths exist + bush category correct
description: Audit script or test checking: (1) all paths in TREE_MODELS, BUSH_MODELS, BROC_ASSETS exist on disk, (2) BUSH_MODELS uses bushes/ not rocks/ category, (3) no missing tile IDs in BiomeWalkConfigs. Write result to test_reports/.

title: Blender script: generate landes_bruyere 3D assets (6 variants each: vegetation, rocks, props)
description: Write tools/blender_scripts/gen_landes_bruyere.py procedurally generating heath/moor assets: low heather bushes, windswept gorse, stone cairns, weathered boulders, standing stones. Export to Assets/bk_assets/vegetation/landes_bruyere/ etc. Also write asset_requests/landes_bruyere.json spec.

title: Blender script: generate cotes_sauvages 3D assets (6 variants each: rocks, props, vegetation)
description: Write tools/blender_scripts/gen_cotes_sauvages.py procedurally generating coastal assets: sea-worn boulders, tidepools, driftwood, coastal shrubs, granite outcroppings, shell clusters. Export to Assets/bk_assets/rocks/cotes_sauvages/ etc. Also write asset_requests/cotes_sauvages.json spec.

title: Audit + document GameFlowController dead path (HubScreen/Run3D)
description: SPECIALIST-14 E2E CHK-14: game_flow_controller.gd + HubScreen.tscn + Run3D.tscn are a parallel game path never used in production (active path: HubAntre→BroceliandeForest3D→MerlinGame). audio_integration.gd wires to GameFlowController. Options: (A) Mark as archived, (B) Delete if confirmed dead, (C) Document as alternate path. First, create task to verify no production script instantiates GameFlowController. If truly dead: file a deletion/archive task. Priority LOW — no player impact, but creates confusion for future development.

title: E2E code trace: full game loop IntroCeltOS→Hub→Run→MerlinGame→EndScreen→Hub
description: SPECIALIST-14: Trace full player loop in code. CHK-1: IntroCeltOS._transition_to_menu sends to Menu3DPC. CHK-2: Menu3DPC has New Game button → SelectionSauvegarde. CHK-3: SelectionSauvegarde → HubAntre. CHK-4: HubAntre Partir button → BroceliandeForest3D. CHK-5: BroceliandeForest encounter signal fires → MerlinGame. CHK-6: MerlinGame run_ended → show_end_screen. CHK-7: EndScreen hub button → HubAntre. Check each signal/button connection for completeness.

title: GameManager creates MerlinStore via call_deferred — verify no scene accesses it before frame+1
description: SPECIALIST-14: game_manager.gd:677 uses get_tree().root.call_deferred('add_child', store) to create MerlinStore. This means MerlinStore is added AFTER the current frame. Risk: if any scene in the boot chain calls get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore') in _ready() during frame 0, it gets null. IntroCeltOS does NOT use MerlinStore (PASS). All gameplay scenes (HubAntre, MerlinGame) are reached after multiple scene transitions so MerlinStore exists by then. Verify: add debug print to game_manager _ready() and confirm call_deferred vs direct add_child. Low risk but worth documenting.

title: Fix BroceliandeForest3D fallback: change_scene_to_file → PixelTransition
description: SPECIALIST-14: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1228 fallback path uses get_tree().change_scene_to_file(target) when PixelTransition not found. This is reachable if PixelTransition autoload fails to load. The primary path (line 1224) uses PixelTransition. Fix: add null guard pattern: var pt: Node = get_node_or_null('/root/PixelTransition'); if pt and pt.has_method('transition_to'): pt.transition_to(target) else: get_tree().change_scene_to_file(target). Line 1228 already does this — verify the guard is correct and consistent with other scene transition helpers.

title: Integration regression: verify all autoloads accessible + MerlinStore created
description: SPECIALIST-14: Regression test for autoload wiring. CHK-1: GameManager autoload in project.godot. CHK-2: MerlinAI autoload in project.godot. CHK-3: game_manager.gd:674 creates MerlinStore via call_deferred. CHK-4: merlin_game_controller.gd:112 store=get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore') gets non-null. CHK-5: merlin_game_controller.gd:121 merlin_ai=get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinAI') gets non-null. CHK-6: SFXManager+PixelTransition+I18nRegistry all in project.godot autoloads.

title: Fix studio_insights.json duplicate IDs (9x insight-20260414-001)
description: Deduplicate 25 entries into ~13 unique insights. Assign globally-sequential IDs (insight-NNN). Add ID generation guard: always increment from max existing ID.

title: Recover 60 missing completed tasks into completed_archive.json
description: completed_archive.json has 2 tasks but 62 were completed per metrics. Reconstruct from events.jsonl cycle summaries: extract task_id + summary + timestamp and create stub archive entries. Enforce housekeeping each cycle.

title: Sync studio_learnings.json metrics: cycles 40→47, add 5 missing agents
description: total_cycles_completed=40 but events.jsonl has 47 entries. Update to 47. Add missing agents to agent_performance: perf_code_quality_auditor, integration_e2e_auditor, faction_rep_auditor, minigame_system_auditor, 3d_scene_asset_auditor.

title: Add i18n/Localization Auditor to specialist roster documentation
description: No specialist audits I18nRegistry compliance. i18n rules in cycle_instructions.md but never enforced by any specialist. Define checklist: grep for hardcoded French strings, verify I18nRegistry.t() usage, check text_registry.json coverage.

title: Define Balance/Economy Auditor specialist checklist
description: No specialist verifies Anam economy (10 runs/node), MOS convergence (target 20-25, hard max 50), death penalty ratio, faction cap ±20/card. Define checklist and add as specialist role.

title: Add automated queue hygiene: auto-archive 'verified' type tasks each cycle
description: False-positive 'verified' type tasks (like E2E-PARCHMENT-PRERUN) should auto-archive at cycle start. Add housekeeping rule: tasks with type='verified' move to completed_archive.json with status='archived'.

title: Delete IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin (director: option B)
description: Director decision q-20260414-005: 'B: Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin'. Actions: (1) Delete scenes/IntroPersonalityQuiz.tscn if exists. (2) Delete scripts/IntroPersonalityQuiz.gd. (3) Delete scenes/SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn if exists. (4) Delete scripts/SceneRencontreMerlin.gd. (5) Check menu_3d_pc.gd for any remaining references to these scenes and remove them. The active flow (Menu3DPC→ParchmentPreRun→Hub) is already correct per SPEC-0 audit.

title: Fix SceneRencontreMerlin dead branching: consolidate or restore SCENE constants
description: SceneRencontreMerlin.gd:10-12 has SCENE_HUB = SCENE_BIOME = SCENE_TUTORIAL = BroceliandeForest3D. The branching logic at lines 628-656 (_next_scene = SCENE_BIOME/SCENE_TUTORIAL/SCENE_HUB) is dead code. Either: (A) restore HubAntre as SCENE_HUB, or (B) remove the branching and use a single constant. BLOCKED: depends on FLOW-QUIZ-WIRE-INTRO decision.

title: New game: ensure biome+Ogham selection before first run via HubAntre
description: ParchmentPreRun→BroceliandeForest3D skips HubAntre entirely, so new players cannot select biome or starter Oghams. Fix: after ParchmentPreRun completes for a first-run player, route to HubAntre first. HubAntre biome selection → TransitionBiome → Forest. Depends on FLOW-QUIZ-WIRE-INTRO architecture decision.

title: First-run detection: route new profiles through personality quiz
description: When MerlinSaveSystem detects no existing profile (first_run=true), gate new game through IntroPersonalityQuiz before ParchmentPreRun. Check in menu_3d_pc.gd._start_new_game(): if not MerlinSaveSystem.profile_exists() → transition to IntroPersonalityQuiz. Depends on FLOW-QUIZ-WIRE-INTRO and director feedback q-20260414-005.

title: IntroCeltOS.gd: replace local GOLD/BG_BLACK constants with MerlinVisual.PALETTE
description: SPECIALIST-1 AUDIT: IntroCeltOS.gd:63-67 defines local color constants (GOLD=Color(0.90,0.75,0.30), GOLD_DIM, GOLD_BRIGHT, GOLD_FAINT, BG_BLACK) violating the rule: ALL colors from MerlinVisual.PALETTE/GBC. Fix: replace with MerlinVisual.PALETTE['gold'], PALETTE['gold_bright'], MerlinVisual.CRT_PALETTE['bg_deep'] etc. Check MerlinVisualPalettes for exact key names. Note: if PALETTE lacks exact matches, add them to MerlinVisualPalettes (do NOT define locally).

title: pixel_transition_config.gd:56 — replace hardcoded Color(0.02,0.02,0.02) with CRT_PALETTE
description: SPECIALIST-1 AUDIT: pixel_transition_config.gd:56 has bg_color: Color(0.02,0.02,0.02) hardcoded. Line 39 already has a comment noting it should use CRT_PALETTE['bg_deep'] but line 56 was not updated. Fix: replace Color(0.02, 0.02, 0.02) with MerlinVisual.CRT_PALETTE['bg_deep'] (or MerlinVisual.CRT_PALETTE.get('bg_deep', Color.BLACK)).

title: bk_forest_test_room.gd: migrate 20+ hardcoded Color() to MerlinVisual or biome palette
description: SPECIALIST-1 AUDIT: bk_forest_test_room.gd has 20+ hardcoded Color() values (COL_GRASS, sky colors, sun, water, fog, etc.). As a 3D scene file these should either come from MerlinVisual.BIOME_CRT_PALETTES['broceliande'] or be declared in a BrochBiomePalette constant block. Low priority since this is primarily a test/dev scene but it sets visual precedent. Add a const BIOME_PALETTE block derived from MerlinVisual.

title: Audit: grep addons/ for Color() violations not from MerlinVisual
description: SPECIALIST-1 AUDIT coverage gap: visual audit only checked scripts/. Run grep Color( on addons/ directory — AI overlay/UI widgets may have hardcoded colors. Generate fix tasks for any violations found.

title: screen_frame.gd:351 — replace Color(1,1,1,0.15) highlight with PALETTE reference
description: SPECIALIST-1 AUDIT: screen_frame.gd:351 uses Color(1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.15) for a highlight effect. Should reference MerlinVisual.CRT_PALETTE['phosphor_bright'] or similar white-equivalent key, modified with alpha. Low priority but completes visual consistency.

title: Add faction ending trigger to check_run_end (bible s.3.8: rep >= 80)
description: SPEC-2 CHK-12 FAIL_HIGH: store_run.gd:202 check_run_end() never checks if any faction has rep >= 80 for ending trigger. FACTION_THRESHOLD_ENDING=80 defined in constants but unused. Bible s.3.8: 'Faction ≥ 80 en fin de scenario → Fin de faction disponible'. Fix: in check_run_end(), when scenario ends (victory or hard_max or cards>=soft_max), check if any faction_rep >= 80 and add faction_ending list to return dict. Complement with FACTION-ENDING-UNLOCK-CHECK test [19].

title: Remove stale life -= 1 drain from broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1075
description: SPEC-2 CHK-23 FAIL_MEDIUM: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1075 has hardcoded `life -= 1` (drain per card) inside the encounter card resolved callback, IGNORING MerlinConstants.LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=0 (director decision q-20260412-001). Also mutates GameManager.run_state directly (dead path — canonical is MerlinStore). This is a dead code path but contradicts the director decision. Fix: remove the `life -= 1` line and the direct GameManager state mutation; rely on run_3d_controller.gd canonical drain system (DRAIN_PER_CARD=0). Also update HUD feedback labels accordingly.

title: Audit + implement faction content unlock gate at rep >= 50 in card pool
description: SPEC-2 CHK-13 NOT_CHECKED: bible s.2.3 '≥50: Cartes spéciales de la faction débloquées dans le pool'. Need to verify: (1) Does merlin_card_system.gd filter cards by faction rep? (2) Is there a special_faction_cards pool? (3) Are cards tagged with required_faction_rep? If not implemented: add rep-gating to card pool selection using faction_rep from state.meta. Special faction cards should only appear if corresponding faction rep >= 50.

title: Integration test: faction ending correctly detected when rep >= 80 at run end
description: SPEC-2 CHK-12: After GDC-FACTION-ENDING-TRIGGER is implemented, write test in test_integration_e2e.gd or new file: simulate run with faction_rep >= 80, call check_run_end(), assert result contains 'faction_endings' list with correct faction key. Also test: 2 factions >= 80 → 'joueur choisit laquelle' (player choice screen expected). And rep=79 → no faction ending. Uses same test infrastructure as T-S2-ARC-CONDITION-REGRESS.

title: Add SFX for direct life damage (DAMAGE_LIFE effect)
description: SPEC-3 SFX-08 FAIL_HIGH: game_controller_effects.gd:187 dispatches DAMAGE_LIFE but plays no SFX for life loss. Only shield activation (line 34) gets skill_activate. Fix: after DAMAGE_LIFE dispatch (line 187), add SFXManager.play('danger') if not blocked by shield. Also: add 'error' SFX if life reaches critical (<20). Check: line 30 guard for new_shield_corps to avoid double SFX with shield.

title: Add hover+click SFX to MenuPrincipalMerlin calendar/collections buttons
description: SPEC-3 SFX-09 FAIL_MEDIUM: calendar_button (line 337) and collections_button (line 340) mouse_entered lambdas only call _anim.on_corner_button_hover — no SFX. _on_calendar_pressed() (line 459) and _on_collections_pressed() (line 470) have no SFX. Fix: add SFXManager.play('hover') in mouse_entered lambdas (after existing anim call). Add _play_ui_sound('click') in _on_calendar_pressed() and _on_collections_pressed() before guard checks.

title: Add SFX to SelectionSauvegarde continue/new/reset/back buttons
description: SPEC-3 SFX-10 FAIL_MEDIUM: All 4 button handlers in SelectionSauvegarde.gd lack SFX. _on_continue_pressed():162 ('confirm'), _on_new_game_pressed():172 ('confirm'), _on_reset_pressed():176 ('error'), _on_back_pressed():190 ('click'). Also add SFXManager.play('hover') in mouse_entered callbacks in _style_button(). Pattern: add SFXManager.play(x) as first line of each handler.

title: Add victory/defeat SFX to end_run_screen.gd reveal
description: SPEC-3 SFX-11 FAIL_MEDIUM: end_run_screen.gd shows run results (score, anam, faction rep) but plays no SFX. On run end reveal: play 'partir_fanfare' if victory (run completed full biome), 'fail' if death, 'confirm' for neutral ending. Also play 'aspect_up'/'aspect_down' when faction rep changes are revealed. Find reveal function (likely _show_results or similar) and add SFXManager.play calls.

title: Archive or delete audio_integration.gd — dead code (SFXEngine missing)
description: SPEC-3 SFX-12 FAIL_LOW: audio_integration.gd (456 lines) references class_name SFXEngine which does NOT exist anywhere in codebase. AudioIntegration.wire_run(), wire_hub(), wire_end_screen(), wire_flow() are never called. Entire file is dead code. Decision required: (A) Remove file + update project.godot if registered, (B) Implement SFXEngine class to make it functional. Recommend: feedback question to director, then either delete or stub SFXEngine.

title: Tween HUD life bar value change (smooth damage/heal animation)
description: SPEC-4 ANIM CHK-01: hud_controller.gd:90 sets _life_bar.value = current directly — instant snap. With drain removed (director decision), life changes come from card effects only. Tween for visual clarity: create_tween().tween_property(_life_bar, 'value', float(current), 0.35).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_CUBIC).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT). Store tween ref to kill on rapid successive changes. Also animate _life_label text with brief scale pulse (1.0→1.15→1.0, 0.2s).

title: Add damage flash tween to HUD life bar
description: SPEC-4 ANIM CHK-02: hud_controller.gd:94-97 changes bar modulate instantly. Add tactile damage feedback: when life decreases, flash _life_bar.modulate from WHITE to danger color to WHITE over 0.4s (TRANS_SINE). When life increases (heal), brief green flash. Pattern: separate _flash_life_change(is_damage: bool) helper. Track previous life in _prev_life var to detect direction.

title: Add stagger entry animation to SelectionSauvegarde buttons
description: SPEC-4 ANIM CHK-03: SelectionSauvegarde.gd dynamically creates save-slot buttons (lines 70-115) that appear instantly. Reference: walk_event_overlay.gd:261-265 stagger pattern. For each button: start modulate.a=0, scale=Vector2(0.85,0.85), animate to modulate.a=1 + scale=ONE with 0.08s delay per index. Use TRANS_BACK EASE_OUT for scale (feel: buttons spring in from small). Run entry animation in _ready() after all buttons added.

title: Add stagger reveal animation to ParchmentPreRun content sections
description: SPEC-4 ANIM CHK-04: parchment_pre_run.gd shows all run summary content simultaneously. Add sequential reveal: (1) biome title fades in (0.3s), (2) ogham list slides in from right after 0.15s, (3) mission brief fades in after 0.3s, (4) enter button fades in (already done at line 198-199, just delay it by 0.5s). Each section starts modulate.a=0. Keep all logic in _start_reveal_sequence() called at end of _start_generation().

title: Fix ui_overlay_narrative → MenuPrincipal.tscn should target Menu3DPC.tscn
description: SPEC-4 TEST WARN-1: ui_overlay_narrative.gd:289 (and :291 fallback) transitions to 'res://scenes/MenuPrincipal.tscn' (old MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd). Active main menu is res://scenes/Menu3DPC.tscn. If narrative end-game escape triggers, player lands on old 2D menu instead of active 3D menu. Fix: change both references on lines 289 and 291 from MenuPrincipal.tscn to Menu3DPC.tscn. Verify MenuOptions is still Menu3DPC-compatible.

title: Test: verify all ANIM tasks implemented (life tween, save stagger, parchment stagger)
description: After ANIM-HUD-LIFE-SMOOTH, ANIM-HUD-LIFE-DAMAGE-FLASH, ANIM-SELECTION-SAUVEGARDE-ENTRY, ANIM-PARCHMENT-CONTENT-STAGGER are completed: (1) grep hud_controller.gd for tween_property on _life_bar — verify not direct .value = assignment. (2) grep SelectionSauvegarde for create_tween + stagger delay. (3) grep parchment_pre_run for sequential modulate.a tween. (4) verify no := with CONST violations introduced. (5) check no orphan tweens (stored refs, kill on update).

title: Fix BrocScreenVfx: reattach screen_vfx.gdshader to SubViewport
description: SPEC-5 CHK-06 FAIL_HIGH: broc_screen_vfx.gd:46 comment says shader removed, _shader_mat never assigned. All screen VFX calls (_set_shader) are no-ops. Fix: load SHADER_PATH, create ShaderMaterial, attach to SubViewportContainer via WorldEnvironment compositor OR use a BackBufferCopy node approach. Glitch/scanlines/vignette/flash are all broken without this fix.

title: Enhance ps1_material.gdshader: affine warp + vertex jitter + 15-bit color
description: SPEC-5 CHK-07 FAIL_HIGH: Director q-20260412-004 PS1/N64 aesthetic. Current shader only does vertex snap + UV snap. Missing: (1) affine texture mapping (remove perspective division from UV — classic PS1 texture warble: UV = UV * VERTEX.z / VIEW_MATRIX[3][2]), (2) per-vertex wobble (add noise to VERTEX before snap), (3) 15-bit color quantization (floor(color * 31)/31 per channel), (4) optional dithered alpha for transparency.

title: Apply GROUND_TINTS to terrain mesh in BrocSeason
description: SPEC-5 CHK-08 FAIL_MEDIUM: broc_season.gd GROUND_TINTS array defined but never applied. _apply_vegetation_tint() only tints tree meshes via _tint_recursive(). Fix: after calling _apply_vegetation_tint(), also find the terrain MeshInstance3D (by group or name convention ground/terrain) in _forest_root and apply GROUND_TINTS[season] to its StandardMaterial3D albedo_color.

title: Expose time_of_day + season to run_state for LLM context
description: SPEC-5 CHK-09 FAIL_MEDIUM: DIR-S2-MNWXQ41M requires time_of_day + season in run_state for LLM. broceliande_forest_3d.gd has _day_night.get_time() (0.0-1.0) and _season.get_current() (0-3) but neither written to store. Fix: (1) Add time_of_day:float + season:int fields to store_run.gd state dict. (2) In broceliande_forest_3d.gd _process(), write MerlinStore.run_state.time_of_day + season each frame (or on change). (3) LLM prompt builder can then include time/season context.

title: Add UV distortion to summer heat haze in seasonal_particles.gdshader
description: SPEC-5 CHK-10 FAIL_LOW: seasonal_particles.gdshader summer mode (season_type==1) only adds a faint color overlay. Real heat shimmer needs UV displacement. Fix: in summer branch, compute offset = sin(uv.x*30+TIME*2)*0.003 + sin(uv.y*20+TIME*1.5)*0.002, then sample TEXTURE(uv + vec2(offset)) and output with low alpha. Current haze variable just blends a color, no distortion.

title: Delete dead shaders/bestiole_squish.gdshader (Bestiole system deleted)
description: SPEC-5 CHK-11 WARN: shaders/bestiole_squish.gdshader is dead code — Bestiole system is listed as DELETED in bible. Grep for any references first, then delete the shader file. If any .tscn or .gd references it, remove those too.

title: Fix all 10px font sizes to minimum 11px (WCAG + studio rule)
description: 6 occurrences of 10px text violate 'Pas de texte < 11px' rule. Fix: calendar_tabs.gd:110,407 (state/counter 10→11); menu_3d_pc.gd:454,843 (clock/legend 10→11); ui_config_module.gd:250 (caption 10→11); Collection.gd:388 compact small_font_size=10→11. AUDIT: SPEC-6 CHK-01 FAIL_HIGH.

title: arbre_de_vie_ui.gd:284 unlock_btn touch target 36→44px
description: unlock_btn.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(0, 36) at line 284 is below WCAG 44px minimum for touch. Change to Vector2(0, 44). AUDIT: SPEC-6 CHK-02 FAIL_MEDIUM.

title: Collection.gd: replace 9 hardcoded French strings with I18nRegistry
description: Lines 504-600: 'Collection', 'Gloire %d', 'Rang %s', 'Passe de Gloire', 'Palier %d - %d / %d', 'Fins & Runes', 'Fins decouvertes et Runes debloquees' hardcoded. Add keys to text_registry.json and replace with I18nRegistry.t()/I18nRegistry.tf(). AUDIT: SPEC-6 CHK-03 FAIL_MEDIUM.

title: HubAntre.gd: replace 7 hardcoded French strings with I18nRegistry
description: Lines 848-926: 'Memoires (%d/13)', 'Aucune memoire collectee.\nContinuez a jouer...', 'Fermer', 'Vies Passees (%d runs)', 'Aucune vie passee.\nTerminez un run pour commencer le journal.' hardcoded. Add to text_registry.json + replace. AUDIT: SPEC-6 CHK-04 FAIL_MEDIUM.

title: parchment_pre_run.gd:71 hardcoded Color(0.75,0.60,0.25) → MerlinVisual.CRT_PALETTE amber
description: Line 71: _loading_label color = Color(0.75, 0.60, 0.25, 0.8) hardcoded. Replace with MerlinVisual.CRT_PALETTE['amber'] (or add alpha separately). Consistent with PALETTE rule. AUDIT: SPEC-6 CHK-10 WARN.

title: SelectionSauvegarde.gd: ensure back_button touch target >=44px
description: back_button styled via _style_button() with content_margin_top/bottom=8 only — no custom_minimum_size. Add back_button.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(0, 44) after _style_button() call to guarantee WCAG touch target on mobile. AUDIT: SPEC-6 CHK-11 WARN.

title: Regression: all active-scene interactive buttons have min height >=44px
description: After UX-TOUCH-TARGET-ARBRE and UX-TOUCH-TARGET-SELECTION-SAVE fixes: trace all custom_minimum_size for interactive buttons in active scenes. Verify >= 44px. Also check font_size >= 11 for user-facing labels. Confirm UX-FONT-SIZE-10-FIX was applied.
